table.name: vtiger_space
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_space` ( `spaceid` int(19) NOT NULL, `floor_number` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `space_status` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `organization_name` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `imagename` varchar(150) DEFAULT NULL, `autocenter_logo` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `x_coords` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `y_coords` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `width_coords` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `height_coords` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`spaceid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

table.name: vtiger_spacecf
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_spacecf` ( `spaceid` int(19) NOT NULL, `cf_1598` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`spaceid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8
